goal: 处理开源前 repo hygiene、README 定位、安装路径补全和 CI 分层

summary.title: 完成开源前 P1 清理
summary.what: 把开源前第一印象相关的仓库 hygiene、CI 分层、README 定位、安装文档和 Mainline skill 公开分发说明一次性收敛：新增 hygiene 脚本和 secret pattern 检查；PR CI 改成 quick gate，full PBT 移到 nightly/manual workflow 和 release gate；README/README.zh 明确 Mainline 是 intent memory layer 而不是 Git 替代品，并标注 public alpha；安装路径补齐 install.sh、GitHub Releases、go install；SECURITY.md 补明确的私密披露 fallback；Mainline skill 移除私有阶段安装和分发描述。
summary.why: 开源前最容易影响信任的是定位不清、安装路径不完整、私有阶段文案残留、CI 反馈过慢以及本地缓存/Hub export/secret 被误提交。本次把这些 P1 项变成文档、ignore 和 CI 门禁，而不是只靠人工检查。
summary.user_goal: 都处理：repo hygiene、README 定位、安装路径补全、清理私有阶段遗留，并把 quick/full PBT CI 分层修好后合并进去。

decisions.chose: 让默认 `make ci` 和 PR workflow 使用 hygiene、lint、quick-test、build；full PBT 放到单独的 nightly/manual workflow，并在 release gate 中强制运行。
decisions.rationale: PR 第一反馈要快；full PBT 仍保留为深度信号，但不阻塞普通 PR 的初始体验。

decisions.chose: 新增 `scripts/hygiene-check.sh` 并接入 `make hygiene` / CI，检查 tracked local artifacts、必需公开文件和 high-signal credential patterns。
decisions.rationale: 开源仓库不能依赖人工记忆避免提交 `.ml-cache`、Hub export、本地 IDE/agent 配置或明显 credential。

decisions.chose: 对 `sk-` token 增加非标识符前缀边界。
decisions.rationale: 历史 Mainline refs 中存在 `risk-*` 文案；裸 `sk-` 规则会把普通英文单词片段误判为 secret，导致 history scan 和 CI 噪音。

decisions.chose: 在英文和中文 README 顶部明确 Mainline 不是 Git 替代品、PR 系统或 session recorder，而是 Git-native intent memory layer，并标注 public alpha。
decisions.rationale: 开源新读者需要先理解产品边界和成熟度，避免按 Git replacement 或完整协作平台来误判。

decisions.chose: README/README.zh 同时列出 install.sh、GitHub Releases、go install，Mainline skill 使用公开 install script / go install / npx skills add。
decisions.rationale: 私有阶段的 GOPRIVATE、SSH repo install 和 future-public 文案会直接破坏开源第一印象。

decisions.chose: SECURITY.md 默认使用 GitHub private vulnerability reporting；未启用时要求开一个不含漏洞细节的公开 issue 请求私密披露渠道。
decisions.rationale: 公开仓库需要一个可执行的 fallback，不能只写“找 maintainer 的 private channel”。

rejected.alternative: 继续让 `make ci` 跑 full PBT
rejected.reason: 这会把慢速深度检查放在每个 PR 的默认路径上，不符合 quick required gate 的目标。

rejected.alternative: 只在 README 里提醒不要提交本地文件
rejected.reason: repo hygiene 属于可自动化的质量门禁，应由 `.gitignore` 和 `make hygiene` 执行。

rejected.alternative: 保留私有阶段安装说明直到正式 release 后再清理
rejected.reason: 用户已经明确要求清掉私有阶段遗留；开源仓库里继续出现 GOPRIVATE/SSH private repo 文案会制造信任问题。

risks: `scripts/hygiene-check.sh` 是 high-signal pattern scan，不是完整 secret-management 方案；它能拦截常见 token/private key 形态，但不能证明历史中不存在所有可能的自定义 secret。

anti_patterns.what: 不要把 full PBT 重新塞回默认 PR quick gate。
anti_patterns.why: 用户明确要 quick/full 两阶段；把 full PBT 放回默认 PR 路径会重新制造慢反馈，影响开源贡献体验。

anti_patterns.what: 不要在公开安装文档或 Mainline skill 中恢复 GOPRIVATE、private repo SSH install 或“仓库公开后再说”的描述。
anti_patterns.why: 这类私有阶段遗留会让开源用户无法安装或误以为项目仍不可用。

acknowledged_constraints.note: preflight 的文件 overlap 只作为 advisory gate；本次对两个 skill overlap 做了人工语义检查，没有把它当自动裁决。
保留 `mainline pr-description` 作为 PR body source of truth；本次只替换 skill 的公开安装/分发说明。
未修改 PR body marker、PR comment workflow 或发布 helper；本次仅清理 skill 安装文案。

review_notes: 验证已通过：`env GOCACHE=/private/tmp/go-build-mainline make quick-test build`。
验证已通过：GitHub workflow YAML parse。
额外 secret scan：当前 tracked files 和 `git log --all -G` high-signal history scan 均无命中；早期 `risk-*` false positive 已通过收紧 `sk-` 边界消除。
preflight 命中 `skills/mainline/SKILL.md` 与 `int_7e059249`、`int_c732f844` 的 proposed overlap；已检查两者分别是 PR description 流程和 worktree/intent 边界指引，本次只修改公开安装/分发文案，语义兼容。

architectural_claims: Mainline's default PR gate should optimize for fast required feedback while retaining full PBT as a scheduled/manual and release signal.
Open-source repository hygiene is enforced by a reusable script rather than only by contributor prose.
Public installation guidance is now centered on release archives, install.sh, and go install instead of private repository access.
behavioral_changes: GitHub CI now has a separate Hygiene job and Build & Test runs `make build` plus `make quick-test` instead of full race/PBT tests.
A new Full PBT workflow runs `make ci-full` on workflow_dispatch, nightly schedule, and push to main.
Release workflow now verifies with `make ci-release` before building archives.
`make ci` now maps to `make ci-quick`; `make ci-full` and `make ci-release` expose the deeper gates explicitly.
`make hygiene` fails if tracked files include `.ml-cache`, local agent/IDE config, Hub export artifacts, root generated Hub pages, or high-signal credential patterns.
README and README.zh now state Mainline is an intent memory layer, not a Git replacement/PR system/session recorder, and mark the project as public alpha.
README and README.zh now document install.sh, GitHub Releases, and go install as first-class install paths.
Mainline skill no longer tells agents to use GOPRIVATE/private GitHub repository install commands.
security_implications: Adds a CI-runnable hygiene scan for common credential patterns and accidentally tracked local/export artifacts.
SECURITY.md now gives public users a safe fallback path to request a private disclosure channel without posting vulnerability details.
migration_notes: Branch protection can keep the historical `Build & Test` check name while changing it to quick-test semantics; full PBT is now represented by a separate workflow.
Contributors using `make ci` locally will now run the quick PR gate; use `make ci-full` for full PBT.

resolves_risks.rationale: Mainline skill install and skill distribution now use public install.sh/go install/npx skills add paths instead of private Git repository access.
SECURITY.md now provides an explicit fallback for requesting a private disclosure channel without publishing vulnerability details.

resolves_followups.rationale: README and README.zh now document go install, GitHub Releases, and install.sh as formal install entries.
